_template: MCP Server Card. TEMPLATE ONLY — there is no hosted sdirstat MCP server at this origin yet. This sketches the tools a thin MCP wrapper around the sdirstat CLI/library would expose; set `url`/transport and remove `_template` once a server exists. MCP: https://modelcontextprotocol.io
name: sdirstat
title: sdirstat disk-usage scanner
description: Scan a directory tree and report disk usage (treemap data, totals, QDirStat cache, JSON).

tools.name: scan_path
tools.description: Scan a directory and return total bytes, entry count, and the nested size tree.

tools.name: total
tools.description: Return only the grand total size of a path (fast).

tools.name: to_qdirstat_cache
tools.description: Emit a QDirStat 2.0 cache file for a path.
